notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela plunked
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela hit by pitch. Trevor Story to 3rd. Marcelo Mayer to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wilyer Abreu GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Wilyer Abreu grounds into a double play, first baseman Alec Burleson to shortstop Thomas Saggese. Willson Contreras out at 2nd. Wilyer Abreu out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Ramón Urías. Connor Wong to 2nd. Connor Wong advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Ramón Urías.

notableEvents.label: Thomas Saggese GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Thomas Saggese grounds into a double play, shortstop Trevor Story to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Ramón Urías to 3rd. José Fermín out at 2nd. Thomas Saggese out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Thomas Saggese rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Thomas Saggese grounds into a double play, shortstop Trevor Story to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Ramón Urías to 3rd. José Fermín out at 2nd. Thomas Saggese out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Ramón Urías. Connor Wong to 2nd. Connor Wong advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Ramón Urías.
